highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 (unreleased) speeds up SKColor hex parsing and folds in an upstream m151 bug-fix sync.

bullets.detail: The bundled engine picks up the latest upstream chrome/m151 fixes.

bullets.lead: Faster SKColor hex parsing with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads
bullets.detail: `SKColor.Parse`/`TryParse` gain `ReadOnlySpan<char>` overloads and skip allocations on the hot path, so slicing a color out of a larger string no longer needs a substring.
The `unsafe` modifier on `GRContextOptions` is dropped — it wasn't needed for the fields it declared, so consumers can now use the type from `/unsafe`-disabled projects without a workaround.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: Cross-backend golden-image visual regression test harness (test infrastructure powering later releases)
